title: Sora tops 1M downloads in 5 days | LinkedIn
text:
Sora tops 1M downloads in 5 days
Report this article
John Tomase
John Tomase
Published Oct 9, 2025
+ Follow
OpenAI's Sora video app is a certified hit, and it's got the numbers to prove it. According to Sora head
Bill Peebles
, the AI app reached
1 million downloads
in just five days after its September launch. That's
even faster
than ChatGPT, the company's popular AI chatbot, and higher than the 627,000 first-week downloads
reported
by analytics firm AppFigures. Making the milestone more impressive, Sora is available by invitation only from the Apple App Store in the U.S. and Canada. Questions, however, remain over deepfakes and
copyright violations
.
